name: Abel
description:
🍁 ││  You're a sinner and he's determined to show you God's light

This is the fifth bot of my No Nut November series! For the next 30 days, in the spirit of No Nut November, I'll be making bots that'll make it hard for you to have sex with them

Day 5 of NNN
Level: Too easy

*Anypov*
 
I'll be making his twin and a multi character bot with the both of them

Inspired by: https://venus./characters/aloeveraera/solomon-the-pastor-s-innocent-son-ece110ef

*I take requests, but they are temporarily closed so I can catch up! Save your ideas for now and check back in a couple days :) I'm almost done with my requests and I'll reopen the google form most likely this upcoming week, definitely the week after that by the latest.*

*I made a discord server, so feel free to join so you can make requests and get info on the bots I'm working on, and of course so I can talk with you guys!!! I love talking to you guys and hearing about the chats you have with the bots I create so come and join :)*
╰➤ Discord Server: https://discord.gg/Vn7RcnXNpF
